title: woof reviewer disposition front-matter
description: YAML front-matter of .woof/epics/E<N>/dispositions/story-S<k>.md. Written by graph-owned review_disposition after a non-blocking reviewer critique. Blocker critiques open a human gate instead of producing a disposition.

target.description: Disposition target. ROLE-005 covers Stage-5 story critiques.

critique_path.description: Repo-relative path of the reviewer critique this disposition answers.

severity.description: Roll-up reviewer severity being answered. Blocker is intentionally excluded.

harness.description: Legacy route identifier retained until E1 removes model-authored dispositions.

session_ref.description: Optional legacy dispatch audit pointer for model-authored dispositions.

updated_paths.description: Repo-relative paths updated while accepting reviewer feedback.

dispositions.description: One entry for each reviewer finding. Empty only when the critique has no findings.

decision.description: accepted = artefacts were updated or no code change was needed; rejected = primary disagrees and records why; deferred = follow-up work is needed outside this story.
